/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libturtle_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -o libturtle_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so CMakeFiles/turtle_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/turtle_interfaces/srv/detail/switch_mode__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/aurora/dev_turtle/build/turtle_interfaces:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libturtle_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
